title: 6 rsync Commands for Fast Sync and Backup
summary: Make backups and deployments quicker and safer with rsync commands for previewing changes, skipping noisy folders, resuming large transfers, and syncing remote targets.
verification_setup: Confirm SSH access works for remote transfer examples.
Replace the example hosts and paths before running the commands.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/rsync_commands_for_fast_sync_and_backup.sh with real paths and SSH targets.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Replace the example hosts and paths, and preview delete-based syncs with --dry-run first.
